atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines design tokens (colors, fonts, spacing, etc.) that become utility classes.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines a custom utility class.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines a custom variant.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: explicitly adds a source path for content scanning.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: loads a Tailwind plugin.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: loads a legacy tailwind.config.js file.

atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v3: injects Tailwind's base, components, or utilities styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS: applies utility classes inside a CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS: registers custom styles in a specific layer (base, components, utilities).
